outcome_record.event_name: Formula 1 2026 Season — Constructor Championship Final Standings Signal

prediction.pre_match_note: F1 2026 Season Final Race (Abu Dhabi). Constructor championship battle. Leading constructor: season-long qualifying average delta vs nearest rival: 0.18s. Constructor retained championship in penultimate race — SMS 80 as season-long validation.

calibration_flags.notes: Constructor tier model validated across full season. Season-average qualifying delta (0.18s) correctly predicted constructor championship. Season-long SMS validation (80) confirms F1 constructor model is stable predictor across multiple races. Highest SMS F1 record in library.
